lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਜਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਫਾਸਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur simarat jam sang na faaseh |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Guru, one is not strangled by the noose of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਾਟੇ ਅਪਮਾਨਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur simarat man niramal hovai gur kaatte apamaanaa he |2|
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Guru, the mind becomes immaculate; the Guru eliminates egotistical pride. ||2||
Meditating in remembrance on the Guru, all the sins are erased.
The Guru's servant meditates on the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਨਰਕਿ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sevak narak na jaae |
lines.english: The Guru's servant is not consigned to hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੁ ਪਾਏ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਦਾ ਨਿਤ ਜੀਅ ਦਾਨਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sevak saadhasang paae gur karadaa nit jeea daanaa he |3|
lines.english: The Guru's servant joins the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; the Guru ever gives the life of the soul. ||3||
At the Gurdwara, the Guru's Gate, the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises are sung.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਕਲੇਸ ਮਿਟਾਏ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਦੇਵੈ ਮਾਨਾਂ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kal kales mittaae satigur har daragah devai maanaan he |4|
lines.english: The True Guru eradicates sorrow and suffering, and bestows honor in the Court of the Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਭਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bhett har jas mukh bhaneeai |
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, one chants the Lord's Praises.
The Guru has revealed the inaccessible and unfathomable Lord.
The True Guru returns to the Path, those who have wandered away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਕ ਕਉ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਭਗਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਪੂਰ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੑਾਇਆ ਗਿਆਨਾਂ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gur sevak kau bighan na bhagatee har poor drirraaeaa giaanaan he |5|
lines.english: No obstacles stand in the way of devotion to the Lord, for one who serves the Guru. The Guru implants perfect spiritual wisdom. ||5||
The Lord of the Universe is permeating and pervading the water and the land.
The Guru has revealed the Lord everywhere.
Meeting with the Guru, all thirst is quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚ ਊਨ ਸਭ ਏਕ ਸਮਾਨਾਂ ਮਨਿ ਲਾਗਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਧਿਆਨਾ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aooch aoon sabh ek samaanaan man laagaa sehaj dhiaanaa he |6|
lines.english: The high and the low are all the same to Him. Focus your mind's meditation intuitively on Him. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਦੀਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀ ਪਾਨਾਂ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sat santokh deea gur poorai naam amrit pee paanaan he |7|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru bestows truth and contentment; I drink in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||7||
Meeting with the Guru, one is not watched by Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਜਪੀ ਤੇਈ ਸਭਿ ਨਿਸਤ੍ਰੇ ਤਿਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਥਾਨਾਂ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jin jin japee teee sabh nisatre tin paaeaa nihachal thaanaan he |8|
lines.english: Those who meditate on it, are all emancipated; they attain the eternal and unchanging home. ||8||
He Himself hears it, and He Himself repeats it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਭ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee baanee sabh maeh samaanee |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Bani is contained in all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਆਪਣ ਭਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh kare su aapan bhaanai |
lines.english: Whatever He does, is according to the Pleasure of His Will.
The Glory of the True Guru is known only to the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਧੂਰਿ ਜਾਚਹਿ ਜਨ ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਨਾਂ ਹੇ ॥੯॥੧॥੪॥
lines.translit: saadhoo dhoor jaacheh jan tere naanak sad kurabaanaan he |9|1|4|
lines.english: Your humble servants beg for the dust of the feet of the Holy; Nanak is forever a sacrifice to You. ||9||1||4||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Maaroo, Solahas, Fifth Mehl:
The Primal, Immaculate Lord God is formless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਨੁ ਜਾਤਿ ਚਿਹਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਕੋਈ ਸਭ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: varan jaat chihan nahee koee sabh hukame srisatt upaaeidaa |1|
lines.english: He has no race or social class, no identifying mark. By the Hukam of His Will, He created the entire universe. ||1||
The Detached Lord is Himself prevailing in all.
Out of all the 8.4 million species of beings,
God blessed mankind with glory.
The Gurmukh receives the treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਪਉੜੀ ਤੇ ਜੋ ਨਰੁ ਚੂਕੈ ਸੋ ਆਇ ਜਾਇ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: eis paurree te jo nar chookai so aae jaae dukh paaeidaa |2|
lines.english: That human who misses this chance, shall suffer the pains of coming and going in reincarnation. ||2||
What should I say, to one who has been created.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਸੋਈ ਭੂਲੈ ਸੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਿਸਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਇਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jis aap bhulaae soee bhoolai so boojhai jiseh bujhaaeidaa |3|
lines.english: He alone is confused, whom the Lord Himself confuses. He alone understands, whom the Lord inspires to understand. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਖ ਸੋਗ ਕਾ ਨਗਰੁ ਇਹੁ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: harakh sog kaa nagar ihu keea |
lines.english: This body has been made the village of joy and sorrow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਹਾ ਗੁਣਾ ਤੇ ਰਹੈ ਨਿਰਾਰਾ ਸੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: trihaa gunaa te rahai niraaraa so guramukh sobhaa paaeidaa |4|
lines.english: One who remains untouched by the three qualities, the three gunas - such a Gurmukh is blessed with glory. ||4||
They alone are emancipated, who seek the Sanctuary of the True Guru.
Only serves to tie your feet.
You can do anything, but whatever you do,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਰੁਤਾ ਬੀਜੁ ਬੀਜੇ ਨਹੀ ਜੰਮੈ ਸਭੁ ਲਾਹਾ ਮੂਲੁ ਗਵਾਇਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: kurutaa beej beeje nahee jamai sabh laahaa mool gavaaeidaa |5|
lines.english: The seed which is planted out of season does not sprout, and all one's capital and profits are lost. ||5||
In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises are most sublime and exalted.
Become Gurmukh, chant and focus your meditation.
